title: PSSSB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Assistant Posts
description: The Punjab Subordinate Service Selection Board (PSSSB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Senior Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, B.E./B. Tech can apply for the PSSSB Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection pro...
